mapper.sql: A.NTICKET_MST_SEQ, A.NTICKET_TYPE_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, A.SSVC_OBJ_CD, A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SIPMS_SVC_NM, A.SEX_SVC_CD, A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SIP_BLOCK , A.NBITMASK, A.NCNT, A.NCLASS_CNT, A.SACTION_RESULT_TXT , A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_TICKET_MST A
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_TICKET_MST A
